testcase.name: @BeforeClass configBC

failure.message: Parameter 'Browser' is required by BeforeClass on method configBC but has not been marked @Optional or defined in C:\Users\rajpa\SeleniumPractice\ConcastCRMFramework\Suite_DistributedParallel.xml
